title: An Institutional Terminal for Retail Investors
abstract:
Wall Street pays up to $30k/year for terminals. They have access to better data & faster intel than most investors. That's one of the reasons why they win big.

The playing field is finally changing... We built a Wall Street terminal for retail investors.

Finally, retail investors c
abstract_zh: Wall Street的小密室年赚3万，现在咱们平民也能分一杯羹了！“Show HN”就是你的私人交易终端，让你也能享受专业级的数据和情报。从此，零售投资者也能逆袭成为投资界的“内行玩家”！别再羡慕别人的大佬座驾，咱们也有专业的驾驶舱！
